_doc: Monotonic coverage floors (Plan v3 Fase 1.2). Raise as coverage climbs; never lower silently. Enforced by scripts/check-coverage-ratchet.cjs against coverage/coverage-summary.json. Global seeded at the 2026-05-29 baseline (floored to integers; EPSILON in the checker absorbs sub-point noise). Per-file floors lock in gains on critical paths as they're improved.
